tool.name: Databricks Lakeflow Jobs
tool.description: Workflow automation for Databricks tasks, pipelines, and ML workloads with DAG, trigger, and observability support.
strengths: Native notebook, pipeline, and ML workflow support
tool.pricing: Databricks workload and job execution costs depend on the underlying compute and services used.
tool.logoNotes: Official Databricks wordmark reused across Databricks product entries because the public Databricks brand portal exposes the vendor lockup, while Lakeflow Jobs does not expose a distinct standalone public mark.
tool.practitionerNote: Strong when orchestration mostly coordinates Databricks notebooks, pipelines, and ML runs, but it is not the same thing as a broad cross-SaaS automation layer.

dataResidency.detail: Workspace data stays in the workspace region; audit logs are region-local.

deployment.detail: Managed SaaS on AWS/Azure/GCP; dedicated single-tenant available; no OSS self-hosted edition.

auditLogging.detail: Audit log system tables capture workspace/account events across the platform.

soc2.detail: Databricks SOC 2 Type II across all clouds/regions.

iso27001.detail: ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certified across all three clouds.

iso42001.detail: No public ISO 42001 certification listed for Databricks as of 2026-05.

euAiAct.detail: Data pipeline / ML workflow orchestrator, not an AI model provider.
